ddls:
CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "acquired_from" INTEGER /* Class or source from which the action is acquired */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level required to acquire the action */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the action (e.g., Spell, Ability) */,
  "mp_cost" INTEGER /* MP cost to cast the action */,
  "casting_time" INTEGER /* Time required to cast the action */,
  "recast_time" INTEGER /* Time before the action can be recast */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action's effect */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (e.g., damage, heal, buff, debuff) */,
  "effect_value" TEXT /* Value of the effect (e.g., 5000, 1000 HP) */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., single, AoE) */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Description of the target type */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the action is used (e.g., PvP, PvE) */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the latest version of the action */,
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the latest balance entry for the action */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the action is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_acquired_from FOREIGN KEY ("acquired_from") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES action_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_mp_cost FOREIGN KEY ("mp_cost") REFERENCES mp_costs ("mp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_casting_time FOREIGN KEY ("casting_time") REFERENCES casting_times ("casting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_balance_id FOREIGN KEY ("balance_id") REFERENCES action_balances ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES action_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_recast_time FOREIGN KEY ("recast_time") REFERENCES recast_times ("recast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES action_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action type */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the action type can be customized */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of class (e.g., tank, healer, DPS) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_value" INTEGER /* Level value */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the level is locked (e.g., requires a quest to unlock) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mp_costs" (
  "mp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MP cost */,
  "mp_value" INTEGER /* MP value */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the MP cost is optional */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the MP cost was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the MP cost was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casting_times" (
  "casting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each casting time */,
  "casting_value" TEXT /* Casting time value (e.g., 1.44s, Instant) */,
  "is_instant" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the casting time is instant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the casting time was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the casting time was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recast_times" (
  "recast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recast time */,
  "recast_value" TEXT /* Recast time value (e.g., 2.4s, 15s) */,
  "is_instant" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the recast time is instant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recast time was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recast time was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action being used */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player using the action */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was used */,
  "usage_context" TEXT /* Context of the usage (e.g., PvP, PvE) */,
  "context_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the usage context (e.g., specific map, zone) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_usage_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_usage_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., developer, tester, content creator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "is_revertable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the version can be reverted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_versions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance entry */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action */,
  "balance_date" TEXT /* Date of the balance change */,
  "balance_stat" TEXT /* Stat being balanced (e.g., potency, casting time) */,
  "balance_value" TEXT /* Value of the balanced stat */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the balance change is critical */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the balance entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_balances_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of the effect (e.g., damage, heal) */,
  "effect_value" TEXT /* Value of the effect (e.g., 5,000, HP) */,
  "is_stacking" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the effect can stack */,
  "stack_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of stacks for the effect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the effect was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the effect was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_effects_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target type */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., single, AoE) */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Description of the target type */,
  "is_area_of_effect" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the target is an area of effect */,
  "radius" INTEGER /* Radius of the area of effect (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_targets_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., PvP, AoE) */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the tag is hidden from players */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_tags_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of the requirement (e.g., level, equipment) */,
  "requirement_value" TEXT /* Value of the requirement (e.g., 30, heavy armor) */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the requirement is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the requirement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_requirements_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)
